extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming that keys are missing from their laptop keyboard.

image_assessments.notes: The image shows an external keyboard and mouse, not a laptop. No missing keys are visible on this keyboard.
The image shows a close-up of a keyboard with one keycap visibly missing.

result.user_claim: Customer: Teclas del laptop faltan despues de una caida. | Support: Are you reporting missing keyboard keys? | Customer: Si, some keycaps came off. | Support: Is the claim about the laptop keyboard specifically? | Customer: Yes, laptop keyboard keys missing.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed keyboard with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed keyboard with visible missing_part. Supporting images: img_2.
